name: substrate-adapters-bundle
absorption_note: 8 thin re-export shim crates (engine-agentapi, engine-claude, engine-codex, engine-forge, omniroute-adapter, cliproxy-adapter, context-budget, substrate-trace) that delegate via `pub use` to the canonical substrate monorepo crates. The substrate repo (AFFIRM) already holds the canonical source. The bundle is redundant for fleet use and is archived as such. No physical transfer to pheno workspace; no fork relationships created.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; ARCHIVE_ONLY same day. See audits/absorption-justifications/substrate-adapters-bundle-2026-07-17.md and docs/boundary/substrate-adapters-bundle.md.
